purpose: Evidence for the alternate targeted HEALPix/cone Gaia fetch strategy around faint Hipparcos stars.
coordinate_note: Raw Hipparcos RArad/DErad were converted from radians to degrees. These are raw Hipparcos source positions, not the processed J2016 propagated positions.

method.neighbor_expansion: Count the HEALPix cell containing each HIP target plus all immediate neighbour cells.
method.cone_footprint: Use astropy-healpix cone_search_lonlat to count HEALPix cells intersecting a cone around each HIP target.

decision_context: Targeted cone/HEALPix fetching remains a fallback option. The current next attempt is a full-sky Gaia G<=15 skinny field download because the pipeline-shaped count was 36,635,159 rows, lower than initially feared.
